channel.title: Self-Hosted on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosted on ExitCode0

item.title: Running Ollama in a Proxmox LXC with NVIDIA GPU Passthrough
item.description: A complete guide to setting up Ollama inside a Proxmox LXC container with full NVIDIA GPU passthrough, Tailscale access, and Open WebUI — run your own local LLMs with GPU acceleration.

item.title: Automating Postgres Deployment with Docker Compose and Init Scripts
item.description: Deploy PostgreSQL with Docker Compose and an init script that auto-creates databases and users. Portable, isolated Postgres setup with Docker Compose V2 and Bash initialisation.

item.title: Running Uptime Kuma With Docker Compose
item.description: Deploy Uptime Kuma website and API monitoring with Docker Compose. Self-hosted uptime tracker and status page for infrastructure monitoring in a home lab.
